api_access.conditions: Subject to GitHub API Terms (Section H). API usage must comply with rate limits and acceptable use policies. May require authentication depending on endpoint and usage level.

scrape_data.conditions: Automated scraping is addressed under API Terms (Section H). Scraping beyond what the API permits or without authorization is prohibited under Acceptable Use policies.

post_content.scope: Repositories, issues, comments, and other user-generated content
post_content.conditions: User retains ownership of posted content but grants GitHub a license to host, display, and provide the service. Content must comply with Acceptable Use Policies and Community Guidelines. By posting, user grants GitHub necessary rights to provide the service.

allow_training.conditions: Users may opt out of use of their private repository content for AI/ML training. Public repository content may be used subject to applicable license terms and GitHub's policies. GitHub Copilot and related AI features are governed by separate Additional Product Terms.

create_account.conditions: Must be 13 years of age or older. One free Personal Account per person. Must provide accurate information. Automated account creation is prohibited.

make_purchases.scope: GitHub paid plans, Marketplace apps, and add-ons
make_purchases.conditions: Paid plans and Marketplace purchases available. User is responsible for all fees. GitHub Marketplace subject to separate Marketplace Terms of Service.
